nodes.label: AI as teaching tool for digital literacy
nodes.label_negative: AI as fobbing off or avoidance
nodes.grounding_span: I really want to show them how to resolve it. Generative AI is particularly good for this

nodes.label: AI for broad zeitgeist and trending knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I like to check what is happening in the book zeitgeist so I know what might have broad appeal

nodes.label: AI as tool for specific niche knowledge gaps
nodes.label_negative: AI for tasks where I have expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I mainly use it for very specific things that I might not have knowledge about

nodes.label: AI as self-guided problem-solving resource
nodes.label_negative: AI as direct answer provider without learning
nodes.grounding_span: I like to give them the tools to be self guided so they can figure out future problems themselves

nodes.label: AI adoption influenced by technical fluency
nodes.label_negative: AI adoption hindered by low technical fluency
nodes.grounding_span: I'm probably more likely to use generative AI just because of my familiarity with the tools

nodes.label: AI as societal disruptor of labor market
nodes.label_negative: AI as benign tool without social consequences
nodes.grounding_span: I have been worried about social effects with corporations and organisations moving away from human labor

nodes.label: Community empowerment and digital literacy
nodes.grounding_span: I really want to show them how to resolve it

nodes.label: Curated collection relevance
nodes.grounding_span: There is nothing worse than buying four copies of a book that no-one wants to read

nodes.label: Personal expertise and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I write all my own emails and do genuinely prefer to do most of my writing myself

nodes.label: Social responsibility and awareness
nodes.grounding_span: I have been worried about social effects with corporations and organisations moving away from human labor

nodes.label: Satisfaction in introducing AI to receptive patrons
nodes.grounding_span: I love the moment when introduce it to someone who will find it genuinely helpful

nodes.label: Frustration with philosophical resistance to AI
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes you'll find someone resistant philosophically and they take it as you trying to fob them off

nodes.label: Concern about AI's societal impact on labor
nodes.grounding_span: I have been worried about social effects with corporations and organisations moving away from human labor

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as a life skill for individuals
nodes.grounding_span: I really think that them being able to use generative AI is actually a life skill

nodes.label: Strategic task delegation based on expertise and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I mainly use it for very specific things that I might not have knowledge about

nodes.label: Teaching-oriented scaffolding approach
nodes.grounding_span: I like to give them the tools to be self guided so they can figure out future problems themselves
